name: token-monitor-hub-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker deployment of the Token Monitor hub.

TOKEN_MONITOR_SECRET.description: Required. Shared secret for protected hub routes. Agents, widgets, and API clients must present it when posting or reading private stats. Generate a long random string, e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`.

PUBLIC_STATS_ENABLED.description: Optional. Set to 1 to expose the unauthenticated GET /api/public/stats endpoint. Leave blank to keep it off.

author: Javis
